message.content: @startuml skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 skinparam classFontStyle italic skinparam classBackgroundColor #F0F0F0 skinparam classBorderColor #333333 skinparam classFontColor #000000 skinparam classStereotypeFontStyle normal skinparam classStereotypeFontColor #000000 skinparam classStereotypeBackgroundColor #D4F1F4 skinparam classStereotypeBorderColor #333333 skinparam classStereotypeFontColor #000000 skinparam classStereotypeFontStyle bold class "Component" as Component { } class "ConcreteComponent" as ConcreteComponent { } class "Decorator" as Decorator { } class "ConcreteDecoratorA" as ConcreteDecoratorA { } class "ConcreteDecoratorB" as ConcreteDecoratorB { } Component <|-- ConcreteComponent Decorator <|-- ConcreteDecoratorA Decorator <|-- ConcreteDecoratorB note right of Component A end note note right of ConcreteComponent A end note note right of Decorator A end note note right of ConcreteDecoratorA C end note note right of ConcreteDecoratorB C end note @enduml
